title: 8 Mil Nitrile Disposable Diamond Grip Gloves, Heavy-Duty, Latex & Powder Free, Food Safe, Extra Thick For Mechanic Automotive Oil Work (Black, Medium [Size 8])
features: Maximum Grip Performance: All Supreme's gloves feature an ergonomic grip and score maximum points for dexterity in international tests. Supreme TTF-8G features a diamond texture on the inside and outside for maximum grip performance, even when working with oil and grease.
Chemical Resistant: Ideal for use with brake fluid, thinners, Diesel and oil etc

Silicone Free: With an increase in demands for silicone free manufacturing environments, all our nitrile Supreme single use disposable gloves have been developed silicone free, making them ideal for painting or bonding applications, and helping you maintain a silicone free facility.

Reduced wastage and overall glove use: All Supreme gloves are ambidextrous, so you do not have to split a pair to replace a damaged glove. The Supreme TTF-8G range is also suitable for use in industrial environments including: Manufacturing, Engineering, Construction, Janitorial and Agricultural applications.
description: 8.0 Mil Orange Black Nitrile Disposable Gloves Strong Heavy Duty Powder Free Car Mechanic Orange Black Diamond Texture Nitrile Disposable gloves are Silicone free, diamond textured, chemical tested, orange, ultra heavy weight disposable nitrile gloves. Supreme TTF 8.0 Mil heavy and ultra heavy-duty gloves. Colors: Orange, Black Package Included: 1 Box (50 Pcs) Sizes: Medium, Large, Xlarge, 2Xlarge
